title: Checkpoint of imported container with different name fails
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

Podman/CRIU fails to checkpoint a container restored using `--import` and `--name`.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Create container
```
podman run -d --name looper busybox /bin/sh -c 'i=0; while true; do echo $i; i=$(expr $i + 1); sleep 1; done'
```

2. Checkpoint container with `--export` and remove old container
```
podman container checkpoint --export cr.tar looper
podman rm looper
```

3. Restore container checkpoint with `--import` and `--name`
```
podman container restore --import cr.tar --name looper-1
```

4. Checkpoint the new container
```
podman container checkpoint looper-1
```

**Describe the results you received:**

```
ERRO[0000] container is not destroyed                   
ERRO[0000] criu failed: type NOTIFY errno 0
log file: /var/lib/containers/storage/vfs-containers/d5189d6be9b1983be029a3876720bf220da7fe97d4f1f860054fadb3472ee622/userdata/dump.log 
Error: `/usr/bin/runc checkpoint --image-path /var/lib/containers/storage/vfs-containers/d5189d6be9b1983be029a3876720bf220da7fe97d4f1f860054fadb3472ee622/userdata/checkpoint --work-path /var/lib/containers/storage/vfs-containers/d5189d6be9b1983be029a3876720bf220da7fe97d4f1f860054fadb3472ee622/userdata d5189d6be9b1983be029a3876720bf220da7fe97d4f1f860054fadb3472ee622` failed: exit status 1
```

CRIU logs ([dump.log](https://github.com/containers/podman/files/8356249/dump.log)):
```
(00.001367) Error (criu/seize.c:910): Neither a cgroupv1 (freezer.state) or cgroupv2 (cgroup.freeze) control file found.
(00.001400) Unlock network
(00.001420) Error (criu/seize.c:183): Unable to open /sys/fs/cgroup/machine.slice/libpod-d5189d6be9b1983be029a3876720bf220da7fe97d4f1f860054fadb3472ee622.scope/freezer.state: No such file or directory
(00.001427) Unfreezing tasks into 1
(00.001434) 	Unseizing 75881 into 1
(00.001444) Error (compel/src/lib/infect.c:355): Unable to detach from 75881: No such process
(00.001458) Error (criu/cr-dump.c:1781): Dumping FAILED.
```

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```

Git Commit:   730f1db4da8e6707a21f1615f7ff6a1b49123342
Built:        Sat Mar 26 19:48:17 2022
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

comments.body:
We solved this. This needs a fix in CRIU and runc/crun. CRIU tries to restore the original cgroup settings but runc/crun places the new container in another cgroup and so there is a wrong cgroup setting after restore.

* https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/criu/pull/1800
* https://github.com/opencontainers/runc/pull/3447

I will also open the corresponding crun pull request.
